ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the equipment belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the equipment belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "application" TEXT /* Most common or suitable applications for the equipment */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of units available */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rental rate */,
  "daily_rate" REAL /* Daily rental rate */,
  "weekly_rate" REAL /* Weekly rental rate */,
  "monthly_rate" REAL /* Monthly rental rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the representative belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_representatives_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who rented the equipment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was returned */,
  "rental_type" TEXT /* Type of rental (hourly, daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_payments_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was maintained */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, staff, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each equipment item
ID of the category the equipment belongs to
ID of the subcategory the equipment belongs to
Most common or suitable applications for the equipment
ID of the category the subcategory belongs to
ID of the customer the representative belongs to
ID of the customer who rented the equipment
Type of rental (hourly, daily, weekly, monthly)
ID of the rental the payment is for
Unique identifier for each maintenance event
Role of the user (admin, staff, customer)
ID of the rental the invoice is for
ID of the invoice the payment is for
ID of the customer who wrote the review
